def compute_model_placement(gpu_num, models):
    GPU_MEMORY_LIMIT = 80
    
    # Helper function to calculate KVPR for a GPU given its models
    def kvpr_for_gpu(gpu_models):
        if not gpu_models:
            return 0.0
        load = sum(m.req_rate / m.slo for m in gpu_models)
        mem = sum(m.model_size for m in gpu_models)
        remaining = GPU_MEMORY_LIMIT - mem
        if remaining <= 0:
            return float('inf')
        return load / remaining
    
    # Calculate max KVPR across all GPUs
    def max_kvpr(placement):
        max_val = 0.0
        for i in range(gpu_num):
            kvpr = kvpr_for_gpu(placement[i])
            if kvpr > max_val:
                max_val = kvpr
        return max_val
    
    best_placement = None
    best_kvpr = float('inf')
    
    # Try multiple random starts
    for attempt in range(30):
        # Shuffle models for different starting points
        import random
        random.shuffle(models)
        placement = [[] for _ in range(gpu_num)]
        gpu_mem = [0] * gpu_num
        
        # Greedy assignment
        for model in models:
            best_gpu = -1
            best_kvpr_increase = float('inf')
            
            # Try all GPUs to see which one has the minimal increase in max KVPR
            for gid in range(gpu_num):
                if gpu_mem[gid] + model.model_size <= GPU_MEMORY_LIMIT:
                    # Temporarily add model to calculate new KVPR
                    old_kvpr = kvpr_for_gpu(placement[gid])
                    temp_placement = placement[gid] + [model]
                    new_kvpr = kvpr_for_gpu(temp_placement)
                    
                    # Calculate the increase in maximum KVPR if this model is added here
                    if old_kvpr == 0:
                        kvpr_increase = new_kvpr
                    else:
                        kvpr_increase = new_kvpr - old_kvpr
                    
                    if kvpr_increase < best_kvpr_increase:
                        best_kvpr_increase = kvpr_increase
                        best_gpu = gid
            
            # If no feasible GPU found, assign to one with most free memory
            if best_gpu == -1:
                best_gpu = max(range(gpu_num), key=lambda g: GPU_MEMORY_LIMIT - gpu_mem[g])
            
            placement[best_gpu].append(model)
            gpu_mem[best_gpu] += model.model_size
        
        # Local search: try to improve by moving models between GPUs
        current_kvpr = max_kvpr(placement)
        improved = True
        iteration = 0
        
        while improved and iteration < 200:
            improved = False
            iteration += 1
            
            # Try moving models between GPUs
            for i in range(gpu_num):
                for j in range(gpu_num):
                    if i == j:
                        continue
                    # Only consider moving if moving reduces the max KVPR
                    for mi in range(len(placement[i])):
                        model = placement[i][mi]
                        if gpu_mem[j] + model.model_size > GPU_MEMORY_LIMIT:
                            continue
                        
                        # Calculate KVPRs before move
                        old_kvpr_i = kvpr_for_gpu(placement[i])
                        old_kvpr_j = kvpr_for_gpu(placement[j])
                        old_max = max(old_kvpr_i, old_kvpr_j)
                        
                        # Move model temporarily
                        placement[i].pop(mi)
                        placement[j].append(model)
                        gpu_mem[i] -= model.model_size
                        gpu_mem[j] += model.model_size
                        
                        # Calculate new KVPRs
                        new_kvpr_i = kvpr_for_gpu(placement[i])
                        new_kvpr_j = kvpr_for_gpu(placement[j])
                        new_max = max(new_kvpr_i, new_kvpr_j)
                        
                        # For other GPUs, recalculate their KVPRs
                        for k in range(gpu_num):
                            if k != i and k != j:
                                new_max = max(new_max, kvpr_for_gpu(placement[k]))
                        
                        if new_max < old_max - 1e-9:
                            # Accept the move
                            current_kvpr = new_max
                            improved = True
                            break  # Restart search
                        else:
                            # Revert the move
                            placement[j].pop()
                            placement[i].insert(mi, model)
                            gpu_mem[i] += model.model_size
                            gpu_mem[j] -= model.model_size
                    
                    if improved:
                        break
                if improved:
                    break
        
        # Also try swapping models between GPUs
        improved = True
        iteration = 0
        
        while improved and iteration < 100:
            improved = False
            iteration += 1
            
            for i in range(gpu_num):
                for j in range(i + 1, gpu_num):
                    for mi in range(len(placement[i])):
                        for mj in range(len(placement[j])):
                            model_i = placement[i][mi]
                            model_j = placement[j][mj]
                            
                            # Check if swapping is possible
                            mem_i_after = gpu_mem[i] - model_i.model_size + model_j.model_size
                            mem_j_after = gpu_mem[j] - model_j.model_size + model_i.model_size
                            
                            if mem_i_after > GPU_MEMORY_LIMIT or mem_j_after > GPU_MEMORY_LIMIT:
                                continue
                            
                            # Calculate KVPRs before swap
                            old_kvpr_i = kvpr_for_gpu(placement[i])
                            old_kvpr_j = kvpr_for_gpu(placement[j])
                            old_max = max(old_kvpr_i, old_kvpr_j)
                            
                            # Swap models
                            placement[i][mi], placement[j][mj] = placement[j][mj], placement[i][mi]
                            gpu_mem[i] = mem_i_after
                            gpu_mem[j] = mem_j_after
                            
                            # Calculate new KVPRs
                            new_kvpr_i = kvpr_for_gpu(placement[i])
                            new_kvpr_j = kvpr_for_gpu(placement[j])
                            new_max = max(new_kvpr_i, new_kvpr_j)
                            
                            # Recalculate max KVPR
                            for k in range(gpu_num):
                                if k != i and k != j:
                                    new_max = max(new_max, kvpr_for_gpu(placement[k]))
                            
                            if new_max < old_max - 1e-9:
                                current_kvpr = new_max
                                improved = True
                                break  # Restart search
                            else:
                                # Revert swap
                                placement[i][mi], placement[j][mj] = placement[j][mj], placement[i][mi]
                                gpu_mem[i] = gpu_mem[i] + model_i.model_size - model_j.model_size
                                gpu_mem[j] = gpu_mem[j] + model_j.model_size - model_i.model_size
                        
                        if improved:
                            break
                    if improved:
                        break
                if improved:
                    break
        
        # Update best solution
        if current_kvpr < best_kvpr - 1e-9:
            best_kvpr = current_kvpr
            best_placement = [list(gpu_models) for gpu_models in placement]
    
    # Convert to required dictionary format
    if best_placement is None:
        best_placement = [[] for _ in range(gpu_num)]
        for model in models:
            gpu_id = min(range(gpu_num), key=lambda g: sum(m.model_size for m in best_placement[g]))
            best_placement[gpu_id].append(model)
    
    return {i: best_placement[i] for i in range(gpu_num)}

def compute_model_placement(gpu_num, models):
    import random
    import math
    
    GPU_MEMORY_LIMIT = 80
    
    # Helper function to calculate KVPR for a GPU given its models
    def kvpr_for_gpu(gpu_models):
        if not gpu_models:
            return 0.0
        load = sum(m.req_rate / m.slo for m in gpu_models)
        mem = sum(m.model_size for m in gpu_models)
        remaining = GPU_MEMORY_LIMIT - mem
        if remaining <= 0:
            return float('inf')
        return load / remaining
    
    # Calculate max KVPR across all GPUs
    def max_kvpr(placement):
        max_val = 0.0
        for i in range(gpu_num):
            kvpr = kvpr_for_gpu(placement[i])
            if kvpr > max_val:
                max_val = kvpr
        return max_val
    
    best_placement = None
    best_kvpr = float('inf')
    
    # Try multiple random starts
    for attempt in range(30):
        # Shuffle models for different starting points
        random.shuffle(models)
        placement = [[] for _ in range(gpu_num)]
        gpu_mem = [0] * gpu_num
        
        # Greedy assignment based on model size and load
        for model in models:
            best_gpu = -1
            min_potential_max_kvpr = float('inf')
            
            # Try all GPUs to see which one has the minimal potential increase in max KVPR
            for gid in range(gpu_num):
                if gpu_mem[gid] + model.model_size <= GPU_MEMORY_LIMIT:
                    # Temporarily add model to calculate new KVPR
                    temp_placement = placement[gid] + [model]
                    temp_kvpr = kvpr_for_gpu(temp_placement)
                    
                    # Calculate potential max KVPR with this model added
                    temp_max_kvpr = 0.0
                    for i in range(gpu_num):
                        if i == gid:
                            temp_max_kvpr = max(temp_max_kvpr, temp_kvpr)
                        else:
                            temp_max_kvpr = max(temp_max_kvpr, kvpr_for_gpu(placement[i]))
                    
                    if temp_max_kvpr < min_potential_max_kvpr:
                        min_potential_max_kvpr = temp_max_kvpr
                        best_gpu = gid
            
            # If no feasible GPU found, assign to one with most free memory
            if best_gpu == -1:
                best_gpu = max(range(gpu_num), key=lambda g: GPU_MEMORY_LIMIT - gpu_mem[g])
            
            placement[best_gpu].append(model)
            gpu_mem[best_gpu] += model.model_size
        
        # Local search: try to improve by moving models between GPUs
        current_kvpr = max_kvpr(placement)
        improved = True
        iteration = 0
        
        while improved and iteration < 200:
            improved = False
            iteration += 1
            
            # Try moving models between GPUs
            temp_placement = [list(gpu_models) for gpu_models in placement]
            temp_gpu_mem = gpu_mem[:]
            
            for i in range(gpu_num):
                for j in range(gpu_num):
                    if i == j:
                        continue
                    # Only consider moving if moving reduces the max KVPR
                    for mi in range(len(placement[i])):
                        model = placement[i][mi]
                        if temp_gpu_mem[j] + model.model_size > GPU_MEMORY_LIMIT:
                            continue
                        
                        # Move model temporarily
                        temp_placement[i].pop(mi)
                        temp_placement[j].append(model)
                        temp_gpu_mem[i] -= model.model_size
                        temp_gpu_mem[j] += model.model_size
                        
                        # Calculate new KVPRs
                        new_max = max(kvpr_for_gpu(temp_placement[g]) for g in range(gpu_num))
                        
                        if new_max < current_kvpr - 1e-9:
                            # Accept the move
                            placement = temp_placement
                            gpu_mem = temp_gpu_mem
                            current_kvpr = new_max
                            improved = True
                            break  # Restart search
                        else:
                            # Revert the move
                            temp_placement[j].pop()
                            temp_placement[i].insert(mi, model)
                            temp_gpu_mem[i] += model.model_size
                            temp_gpu_mem[j] -= model.model_size
                    
                    if improved:
                        break
                if improved:
                    break
        
        # Try swapping models between GPUs
        improved = True
        iteration = 0
        
        while improved and iteration < 100:
            improved = False
            iteration += 1
            
            temp_placement = [list(gpu_models) for gpu_models in placement]
            temp_gpu_mem = gpu_mem[:]
            
            for i in range(gpu_num):
                for j in range(i + 1, gpu_num):
                    for mi in range(len(placement[i])):
                        for mj in range(len(placement[j])):
                            model_i = placement[i][mi]
                            model_j = placement[j][mj]
                            
                            # Check if swapping is possible
                            mem_i_after = temp_gpu_mem[i] - model_i.model_size + model_j.model_size
                            mem_j_after = temp_gpu_mem[j] - model_j.model_size + model_i.model_size
                            
                            if mem_i_after > GPU_MEMORY_LIMIT or mem_j_after > GPU_MEMORY_LIMIT:
                                continue
                            
                            # Swap models
                            temp_placement[i][mi], temp_placement[j][mj] = temp_placement[j][mj], temp_placement[i][mi]
                            temp_gpu_mem[i] = mem_i_after
                            temp_gpu_mem[j] = mem_j_after
                            
                            # Calculate new KVPR
                            new_max = max(kvpr_for_gpu(temp_placement[g]) for g in range(gpu_num))
                            
                            if new_max < current_kvpr - 1e-9:
                                current_kvpr = new_max
                                placement = temp_placement
                                gpu_mem = temp_gpu_mem
                                improved = True
                                break  # Restart search
                            else:
                                # Revert swap
                                temp_placement[i][mi], temp_placement[j][mj] = temp_placement[j][mj], temp_placement[i][mi]
                                temp_gpu_mem[i] = temp_gpu_mem[i] + model_i.model_size - model_j.model_size
                                temp_gpu_mem[j] = temp_gpu_mem[j] + model_j.model_size - model_i.model_size
                        
                        if improved:
                            break
                    if improved:
                        break
                if improved:
                    break
        
        # Update best solution
        if current_kvpr < best_kvpr - 1e-9:
            best_kvpr = current_kvpr
            best_placement = [list(gpu_models) for gpu_models in placement]
    
    # Convert to required dictionary format
    if best_placement is None:
        best_placement = [[] for _ in range(gpu_num)]
        for model in models:
            gpu_id = min(range(gpu_num), key=lambda g: sum(m.model_size for m in best_placement[g]))
            best_placement[gpu_id].append(model)
    
    return {i: best_placement[i] for i in range(gpu_num)}

import random

def compute_model_placement(gpu_num, models):
    GPU_MEM = 80
    
    def kvpr_for_models(model_list):
        if not model_list:
            return 0.0
        load = sum(m.req_rate / m.slo for m in model_list)
        mem = sum(m.model_size for m in model_list)
        remaining = GPU_MEM - mem
        if remaining <= 0:
            return float('inf')
        return load / remaining
    
    def max_kvpr(placement):
        max_val = 0.0
        for i in range(gpu_num):
            val = kvpr_for_models(placement[i])
            if val > max_val:
                max_val = val
        return max_val
    
    best_placement = None
    best_value = float('inf')
    
    for attempt in range(50):
        random.shuffle(models)
        placement = [[] for _ in range(gpu_num)]
        gpu_mem = [0] * gpu_num
        
        for model in models:
            best_gpu = -1
            best_inc = float('inf')
            best_mem_remaining = -1
            
            for gid in range(gpu_num):
                if gpu_mem[gid] + model.model_size <= GPU_MEM:
                    old_kvpr = kvpr_for_models(placement[gid])
                    temp_models = placement[gid] + [model]
                    new_kvpr = kvpr_for_models(temp_models)
                    inc = new_kvpr - old_kvpr
                    mem_remaining = GPU_MEM - (gpu_mem[gid] + model.model_size)
                    
                    if inc < best_inc or (abs(inc - best_inc) < 1e-9 and mem_remaining > best_mem_remaining):
                        best_inc = inc
                        best_gpu = gid
                        best_mem_remaining = mem_remaining
            
            if best_gpu == -1:
                best_gpu = max(range(gpu_num), key=lambda g: GPU_MEM - gpu_mem[g])
            
            placement[best_gpu].append(model)
            gpu_mem[best_gpu] += model.model_size
        
        current_val = max_kvpr(placement)
        temp = 1.0
        
        for _ in range(2000):
            move_type = random.random()
            if move_type < 0.6:
                g1 = random.randrange(gpu_num)
                g2 = random.randrange(gpu_num)
                if g1 == g2 or not placement[g1]:
                    continue
                m_idx = random.randrange(len(placement[g1]))
                model = placement[g1][m_idx]
                if gpu_mem[g2] + model.model_size <= GPU_MEM:
                    old_kvpr1 = kvpr_for_models(placement[g1])
                    old_kvpr2 = kvpr_for_models(placement[g2])
                    old_max = max(old_kvpr1, old_kvpr2)
                    
                    placement[g1].pop(m_idx)
                    placement[g2].append(model)
                    gpu_mem[g1] -= model.model_size
                    gpu_mem[g2] += model.model_size
                    
                    new_kvpr1 = kvpr_for_models(placement[g1])
                    new_kvpr2 = kvpr_for_models(placement[g2])
                    new_max = max(new_kvpr1, new_kvpr2)
                    for k in range(gpu_num):
                        if k != g1 and k != g2:
                            new_max = max(new_max, kvpr_for_models(placement[k]))
                    
                    delta = new_max - old_max
                    if delta < 0 or random.random() < math.exp(-delta / temp):
                        current_val = new_max
                    else:
                        placement[g2].remove(model)
                        placement[g1].insert(m_idx, model)
                        gpu_mem[g1] += model.model_size
                        gpu_mem[g2] -= model.model_size
            else:
                g1, g2 = random.sample(range(gpu_num), 2)
                if not placement[g1] or not placement[g2]:
                    continue
                idx1 = random.randrange(len(placement[g1]))
                idx2 = random.randrange(len(placement[g2]))
                m1 = placement[g1][idx1]
                m2 = placement[g2][idx2]
                
                mem1_after = gpu_mem[g1] - m1.model_size + m2.model_size
                mem2_after = gpu_mem[g2] - m2.model_size + m1.model_size
                if mem1_after > GPU_MEM or mem2_after > GPU_MEM:
                    continue
                
                old_kvpr1 = kvpr_for_models(placement[g1])
                old_kvpr2 = kvpr_for_models(placement[g2])
                old_max = max(old_kvpr1, old_kvpr2)
                
                placement[g1][idx1], placement[g2][idx2] = m2, m1
                gpu_mem[g1] = mem1_after
                gpu_mem[g2] = mem2_after
                
                new_kvpr1 = kvpr_for_models(placement[g1])
                new_kvpr2 = kvpr_for_models(placement[g2])
                new_max = max(new_kvpr1, new_kvpr2)
                for k in range(gpu_num):
                    if k != g1 and k != g2:
                        new_max = max(new_max, kvpr_for_models(placement[k]))
                
                delta = new_max - old_max
                if delta < 0 or random.random() < math.exp(-delta / temp):
                    current_val = new_max
                else:
                    placement[g1][idx1], placement[g2][idx2] = m1, m2
                    gpu_mem[g1] = gpu_mem[g1] + m1.model_size - m2.model_size
                    gpu_mem[g2] = gpu_mem[g2] + m2.model_size - m1.model_size
            
            temp *= 0.995
        
        if current_val < best_value - 1e-9:
            best_value = current_val
            best_placement = [list(gpu_models) for gpu_models in placement]
    
    if best_placement is None:
        best_placement = [[] for _ in range(gpu_num)]
        for model in models:
            gpu_id = min(range(gpu_num), key=lambda g: sum(m.model_size for m in best_placement[g]))
            best_placement[gpu_id].append(model)
    
    return {i: best_placement[i] for i in range(gpu_num)}

import math
import random

def compute_model_placement(gpu_num, models):
    '''
    Args:
        gpu_num: Number of GPUs (int)
        models: List of models with .model_size, .req_rate, .slo

    Returns:
        dict: {gpu_id: [models assigned to that GPU]}
    '''
    
    # Algorithm: Multi-start gradient-based optimization with exact local search
    # Core idea: Treat placement as continuous relaxation, then round to discrete solution
    
    # Step 1: Precompute model characteristics
    models_data = []
    for m in models:
        load = m.req_rate / m.slo
        density = load / m.model_size if m.model_size > 0 else float('inf')
        models_data.append({
            'model': m,
            'size': m.model_size,
            'load': load,
            'density': density
        })
    
    # Step 2: Multi-start with different initializations
    best_solution = None
    best_max_kvpr = float('inf')
    
    for start in range(20):  # Multiple starting points
        # Initialize random feasible placement
        placement = {i: [] for i in range(gpu_num)}
        mem_used = [0] * gpu_num
        gpu_load = [0.0] * gpu_num
        
        # Random shuffle models
        random.shuffle(models_data)
        
        # Greedy assignment to random feasible GPU
        for model_info in models_data:
            feasible_gpus = [g for g in range(gpu_num) 
                           if mem_used[g] + model_info['size'] <= 80]
            if feasible_gpus:
                # Weighted random choice: prefer GPUs with lower current KVPR
                kvprs = []
                for g in feasible_gpus:
                    remaining = 80 - mem_used[g]
                    if remaining > 0:
                        kvpr = gpu_load[g] / remaining
                    else:
                        kvpr = float('inf')
                    kvprs.append(kvpr)
                
                # Inverse weighting: lower KVPR gets higher probability
                if min(kvprs) < max(kvprs):
                    inv_kvprs = [max(kvprs) - k + 1e-6 for k in kvprs]
                    total = sum(inv_kvprs)
                    probs = [k/total for k in inv_kvprs]
                    chosen_gpu = random.choices(feasible_gpus, weights=probs, k=1)[0]
                else:
                    chosen_gpu = random.choice(feasible_gpus)
            else:
                # Should not happen if total memory <= gpu_num * 80
                chosen_gpu = random.randrange(gpu_num)
            
            placement[chosen_gpu].append(model_info['model'])
            mem_used[chosen_gpu] += model_info['size']
            gpu_load[chosen_gpu] += model_info['load']
        
        # Step 3: Local search with gradient-guided moves
        # Instead of random swaps, use gradient information to guide moves
        
        def compute_all_kvprs(mem, load):
            kvprs = []
            for g in range(gpu_num):
                remaining = 80 - mem[g]
                if remaining > 0:
                    kvprs.append(load[g] / remaining)
                else:
                    kvprs.append(float('inf'))
            return kvprs
        
        current_kvprs = compute_all_kvprs(mem_used, gpu_load)
        current_max = max(current_kvprs)
        
        # Track which GPU has maximum KVPR
        max_gpu = current_kvprs.index(current_max)
        
        # Try to reduce KVPR on max GPU by moving models from it to other GPUs
        improvement_found = True
        iteration = 0
        
        while improvement_found and iteration < 100:
            improvement_found = False
            current_kvprs = compute_all_kvprs(mem_used, gpu_load)
            current_max = max(current_kvprs)
            max_gpu = current_kvprs.index(current_max)
            
            # Sort other GPUs by potential to accept models (ascending KVPR)
            other_gpus = [(kvpr, g) for g, kvpr in enumerate(current_kvprs) if g != max_gpu]
            other_gpus.sort()
            
            # Try moving each model from max GPU to other GPUs
            for model_idx, model in enumerate(placement[max_gpu]):
                model_info = None
                for md in models_data:
                    if md['model'] == model:
                        model_info = md
                        break
                
                if not model_info:
                    continue
                
                # Try moving to each other GPU in order of increasing KVPR
                for _, target_gpu in other_gpus:
                    # Check feasibility
                    if mem_used[target_gpu] + model_info['size'] > 80:
                        continue
                    
                    # Calculate new KVPRs
                    new_mem_max = mem_used[max_gpu] - model_info['size']
                    new_load_max = gpu_load[max_gpu] - model_info['load']
                    
                    new_mem_target = mem_used[target_gpu] + model_info['size']
                    new_load_target = gpu_load[target_gpu] + model_info['load']
                    
                    if new_mem_max >= 80 or new_mem_target >= 80:
                        continue
                    
                    new_kvpr_max = new_load_max / (80 - new_mem_max)
                    new_kvpr_target = new_load_target / (80 - new_mem_target)
                    
                    # Calculate overall max
                    old_pair_max = max(current_kvprs[max_gpu], current_kvprs[target_gpu])
                    new_pair_max = max(new_kvpr_max, new_kvpr_target)
                    other_max = max(kvpr for g, kvpr in enumerate(current_kvprs) 
                                  if g not in (max_gpu, target_gpu))
                    
                    old_overall_max = current_max
                    new_overall_max = max(new_pair_max, other_max)
                    
                    if new_overall_max < old_overall_max:
                        # Make the move
                        placement[max_gpu].pop(model_idx)
                        placement[target_gpu].append(model)
                        mem_used[max_gpu] = new_mem_max
                        gpu_load[max_gpu] = new_load_max
                        mem_used[target_gpu] = new_mem_target
                        gpu_load[target_gpu] = new_load_target
                        
                        improvement_found = True
                        break
                
                if improvement_found:
                    break
            
            iteration += 1
        
        # Step 4: Try pairwise swaps between GPUs (more systematic than random)
        # Focus on reducing the maximum KVPR
        current_kvprs = compute_all_kvprs(mem_used, gpu_load)
        current_max = max(current_kvprs)
        max_gpu = current_kvprs.index(current_max)
        
        # Sort GPUs by how much they could help reduce max KVPR
        # GPUs with lower KVPR and more free memory are better targets
        
        for swap_iter in range(50):
            best_swap = None
            best_improvement = 0
            
            # Consider all pairs involving max GPU
            for target_gpu in range(gpu_num):
                if target_gpu == max_gpu or not placement[target_gpu]:
                    continue
                
                # Try swapping each model from max GPU with each model from target GPU
                for i, model1 in enumerate(placement[max_gpu]):
                    model1_info = None
                    for md in models_data:
                        if md['model'] == model1:
                            model1_info = md
                            break
                    
                    if not model1_info:
                        continue
                    
                    for j, model2 in enumerate(placement[target_gpu]):
                        model2_info = None
                        for md in models_data:
                            if md['model'] == model2:
                                model2_info = md
                                break
                        
                        if not model2_info:
                            continue
                        
                        # Check feasibility of swap
                        new_mem_max = (mem_used[max_gpu] - model1_info['size'] 
                                      + model2_info['size'])
                        new_mem_target = (mem_used[target_gpu] - model2_info['size'] 
                                         + model1_info['size'])
                        
                        if new_mem_max > 80 or new_mem_target > 80:
                            continue
                        
                        # Calculate new loads
                        new_load_max = (gpu_load[max_gpu] - model1_info['load'] 
                                       + model2_info['load'])
                        new_load_target = (gpu_load[target_gpu] - model2_info['load'] 
                                          + model1_info['load'])
                        
                        if new_mem_max >= 80 or new_mem_target >= 80:
                            continue
                        
                        new_kvpr_max = new_load_max / (80 - new_mem_max)
                        new_kvpr_target = new_load_target / (80 - new_mem_target)
                        
                        # Calculate improvement
                        old_pair_max = max(current_kvprs[max_gpu], current_kvprs[target_gpu])
                        new_pair_max = max(new_kvpr_max, new_kvpr_target)
                        improvement = old_pair_max - new_pair_max
                        
                        if improvement > best_improvement:
                            best_improvement = improvement
                            best_swap = (max_gpu, i, target_gpu, j, 
                                        model1_info, model2_info)
            
            if best_swap and best_improvement > 1e-6:
                # Execute best swap
                max_gpu_idx, i_idx, target_gpu_idx, j_idx, m1_info, m2_info = best_swap
                
                # Remove models
                model1 = placement[max_gpu_idx].pop(i_idx)
                model2 = placement[target_gpu_idx].pop(j_idx)
                
                # Add swapped models
                placement[max_gpu_idx].append(model2)
                placement[target_gpu_idx].append(model1)
                
                # Update memory and load
                mem_used[max_gpu_idx] = (mem_used[max_gpu_idx] - m1_info['size'] 
                                        + m2_info['size'])
                mem_used[target_gpu_idx] = (mem_used[target_gpu_idx] - m2_info['size'] 
                                           + m1_info['size'])
                
                gpu_load[max_gpu_idx] = (gpu_load[max_gpu_idx] - m1_info['load'] 
                                        + m2_info['load'])
                gpu_load[target_gpu_idx] = (gpu_load[target_gpu_idx] - m2_info['load'] 
                                           + m1_info['load'])
                
                # Recompute KVPRs
                current_kvprs = compute_all_kvprs(mem_used, gpu_load)
                current_max = max(current_kvprs)
                max_gpu = current_kvprs.index(current_max)
            else:
                break
        
        # Step 5: Evaluate solution
        final_kvprs = compute_all_kvprs(mem_used, gpu_load)
        final_max = max(final_kvprs)
        
        if final_max < best_max_kvpr:
            best_max_kvpr = final_max
            best_solution = placement
    
    # Step 6: Ensure we have a valid solution
    if best_solution is None:
        # Fallback: simple greedy
        placement = {i: [] for i in range(gpu_num)}
        mem_used = [0] * gpu_num
        
        for model in models:
            # Find GPU with most free memory
            best_gpu = max(range(gpu_num), key=lambda g: 80 - mem_used[g])
            placement[best_gpu].append(model)
            mem_used[best_gpu] += model.model_size
        
        return placement
    
    return best_solution

import random
import math
import heapq
from collections import defaultdict

def compute_model_placement(gpu_num, models):
    '''
    Args:
        gpu_num: Number of GPUs (int)
        models: List of models with .model_size, .req_rate, .slo

    Returns:
        dict: {gpu_id: [models assigned to that GPU]}
    '''
    MEM_LIMIT = 80
    
    # Precompute model characteristics
    model_data = []
    for m in models:
        load = m.req_rate / m.slo
        density = load / m.model_size if m.model_size > 0 else float('inf')
        model_data.append({
            'model': m,
            'size': m.model_size,
            'load': load,
            'density': density
        })
    
    # Sort by density (high to low) - place demanding models first
    model_data.sort(key=lambda x: x['density'], reverse=True)
    
    best_placement = None
    best_max_kvpr = float('inf')
    
    # Multiple restarts with different random seeds
    num_restarts = 30
    
    for restart in range(num_restarts):
        random.seed(restart * 100 + len(models))
        
        # Initialize GPUs
        placement = {i: [] for i in range(gpu_num)}
        mem_used = [0] * gpu_num
        load_used = [0.0] * gpu_num
        
        # Greedy initial placement with randomization
        for md in model_data:
            feasible_gpus = [g for g in range(gpu_num) 
                           if mem_used[g] + md['size'] <= MEM_LIMIT]
            
            if not feasible_gpus:
                # Fallback: assign to GPU with most free space
                free_space = [MEM_LIMIT - mem_used[g] for g in range(gpu_num)]
                best_gpu = max(range(gpu_num), key=lambda g: free_space[g])
            else:
                # Calculate current KVPR for feasible GPUs
                kvprs = []
                for g in feasible_gpus:
                    remaining = MEM_LIMIT - mem_used[g]
                    if remaining > 0:
                        kvpr = load_used[g] / remaining
                    else:
                        kvpr = float('inf')
                    kvprs.append(kvpr)
                
                # Use softmin to balance exploration/exploitation
                min_kvpr = min(kvprs)
                max_kvpr = max(kvprs)
                
                if max_kvpr - min_kvpr < 1e-6:
                    # All equal, pick randomly
                    best_gpu = random.choice(feasible_gpus)
                else:
                    # Temperature-based selection
                    temperature = 0.3 * (max_kvpr - min_kvpr)
                    weights = [math.exp(-k / temperature) if temperature > 0 else 1.0 
                              for k in kvprs]
                    total_weight = sum(weights)
                    if total_weight > 0:
                        probs = [w / total_weight for w in weights]
                        best_gpu = random.choices(feasible_gpus, weights=probs, k=1)[0]
                    else:
                        best_gpu = random.choice(feasible_gpus)
            
            placement[best_gpu].append(md['model'])
            mem_used[best_gpu] += md['size']
            load_used[best_gpu] += md['load']
        
        # Local search with multiple improvement strategies
        improved = True
        iterations = 0
        max_iterations = 100
        
        while improved and iterations < max_iterations:
            improved = False
            iterations += 1
            
            # Calculate current KVPRs
            kvprs = []
            for g in range(gpu_num):
                remaining = MEM_LIMIT - mem_used[g]
                if remaining > 0:
                    kvprs.append(load_used[g] / remaining)
                else:
                    kvprs.append(float('inf'))
            
            current_max_kvpr = max(kvprs)
            max_gpu = kvprs.index(current_max_kvpr)
            
            # Strategy 1: Move models from max GPU to others
            if placement[max_gpu]:
                # Sort models on max GPU by load/size ratio
                models_on_max = []
                for m in placement[max_gpu]:
                    for md in model_data:
                        if md['model'] == m:
                            models_on_max.append(md)
                            break
                
                models_on_max.sort(key=lambda x: x['load'] / x['size'], reverse=True)
                
                for md_to_move in models_on_max:
                    # Try moving to each other GPU
                    for target_gpu in range(gpu_num):
                        if target_gpu == max_gpu:
                            continue
                        
                        # Check if move is feasible
                        if mem_used[target_gpu] + md_to_move['size'] <= MEM_LIMIT:
                            # Calculate new KVPRs
                            new_mem_max = mem_used[max_gpu] - md_to_move['size']
                            new_load_max = load_used[max_gpu] - md_to_move['load']
                            new_mem_target = mem_used[target_gpu] + md_to_move['size']
                            new_load_target = load_used[target_gpu] + md_to_move['load']
                            
                            # Avoid division by zero
                            if new_mem_max >= MEM_LIMIT or new_mem_target >= MEM_LIMIT:
                                continue
                            
                            new_kvpr_max = new_load_max / (MEM_LIMIT - new_mem_max)
                            new_kvpr_target = new_load_target / (MEM_LIMIT - new_mem_target)
                            
                            # Calculate new maximum KVPR
                            new_kvprs = kvprs[:]
                            new_kvprs[max_gpu] = new_kvpr_max
                            new_kvprs[target_gpu] = new_kvpr_target
                            new_max_kvpr = max(new_kvprs)
                            
                            if new_max_kvpr < current_max_kvpr - 1e-8:
                                # Execute the move
                                placement[max_gpu].remove(md_to_move['model'])
                                placement[target_gpu].append(md_to_move['model'])
                                
                                mem_used[max_gpu] = new_mem_max
                                load_used[max_gpu] = new_load_max
                                mem_used[target_gpu] = new_mem_target
                                load_used[target_gpu] = new_load_target
                                
                                improved = True
                                break
                    
                    if improved:
                        break
            
            # Strategy 2: Pairwise swaps if no improvement from moves
            if not improved:
                best_swap = None
                best_improvement = 0
                
                # Try all pairs of GPUs
                for g1 in range(gpu_num):
                    for g2 in range(g1 + 1, gpu_num):
                        if not placement[g1] or not placement[g2]:
                            continue
                        
                        # Try swapping models between g1 and g2
                        for m1 in placement[g1]:
                            for m2 in placement[g2]:
                                # Find model data
                                md1 = next((md for md in model_data if md['model'] == m1), None)
                                md2 = next((md for md in model_data if md['model'] == m2), None)
                                
                                if not md1 or not md2:
                                    continue
                                
                                # Check feasibility
                                new_mem_g1 = mem_used[g1] - md1['size'] + md2['size']
                                new_mem_g2 = mem_used[g2] - md2['size'] + md1['size']
                                
                                if new_mem_g1 > MEM_LIMIT or new_mem_g2 > MEM_LIMIT:
                                    continue
                                
                                # Calculate new loads
                                new_load_g1 = load_used[g1] - md1['load'] + md2['load']
                                new_load_g2 = load_used[g2] - md2['load'] + md1['load']
                                
                                # Calculate new KVPRs
                                if MEM_LIMIT - new_mem_g1 > 0:
                                    new_kvpr_g1 = new_load_g1 / (MEM_LIMIT - new_mem_g1)
                                else:
                                    new_kvpr_g1 = float('inf')
                                
                                if MEM_LIMIT - new_mem_g2 > 0:
                                    new_kvpr_g2 = new_load_g2 / (MEM_LIMIT - new_mem_g2)
                                else:
                                    new_kvpr_g2 = float('inf')
                                
                                # Calculate new maximum
                                new_kvprs = kvprs[:]
                                new_kvprs[g1] = new_kvpr_g1
                                new_kvprs[g2] = new_kvpr_g2
                                new_max_kvpr = max(new_kvprs)
                                
                                improvement = current_max_kvpr - new_max_kvpr
                                
                                if improvement > best_improvement + 1e-8:
                                    best_improvement = improvement
                                    best_swap = (g1, m1, g2, m2, md1, md2)
                
                # Execute best swap if found
                if best_swap and best_improvement > 0:
                    g1, m1, g2, m2, md1, md2 = best_swap
                    
                    placement[g1].remove(m1)
                    placement[g2].remove(m2)
                    placement[g1].append(m2)
                    placement[g2].append(m1)
                    
                    mem_used[g1] = mem_used[g1] - md1['size'] + md2['size']
                    load_used[g1] = load_used[g1] - md1['load'] + md2['load']
                    mem_used[g2] = mem_used[g2] - md2['size'] + md1['size']
                    load_used[g2] = load_used[g2] - md2['load'] + md1['load']
                    
                    improved = True
        
        # Calculate final KVPR for this restart
        final_kvprs = []
        for g in range(gpu_num):
            remaining = MEM_LIMIT - mem_used[g]
            if remaining > 0:
                final_kvprs.append(load_used[g] / remaining)
            else:
                final_kvprs.append(float('inf'))
        
        final_max_kvpr = max(final_kvprs)
        
        if final_max_kvpr < best_max_kvpr - 1e-8:
            best_max_kvpr = final_max_kvpr
            best_placement = {g: list(placement[g]) for g in range(gpu_num)}
    
    # Return best found solution or fallback
    if best_placement is None:
        # Fallback greedy solution
        best_placement = {i: [] for i in range(gpu_num)}
        mem_used = [0] * gpu_num
        
        for md in model_data:
            # Find GPU with most free space
            free_space = [MEM_LIMIT - mem_used[g] for g in range(gpu_num)]
            best_gpu = max(range(gpu_num), key=lambda g: free_space[g])
            
            if mem_used[best_gpu] + md['size'] <= MEM_LIMIT:
                best_placement[best_gpu].append(md['model'])
                mem_used[best_gpu] += md['size']
    
    return best_placement

import random
import math
import heapq

def compute_model_placement(gpu_num, models):
    GPU_MEM = 80
    
    # Precompute model characteristics
    model_data = []
    for m in models:
        load = m.req_rate / m.slo
        density = load / m.model_size if m.model_size > 0 else float('inf')
        model_data.append((m, m.model_size, load, density))
    
    best_placement = None
    best_max_kvpr = float('inf')
    
    # Multi-start with simulated annealing
    for restart in range(25):
        # Random initialization with memory constraint
        placement = {i: [] for i in range(gpu_num)}
        mem_used = [0] * gpu_num
        load_used = [0.0] * gpu_num
        
        # Shuffle models for random order
        random.shuffle(model_data)
        
        # Greedy placement with probabilistic choice
        for m_obj, size, load, _ in model_data:
            feasible_gpus = [g for g in range(gpu_num) if mem_used[g] + size <= GPU_MEM]
            if not feasible_gpus:
                # Emergency fallback: put on GPU with most free memory
                g = max(range(gpu_num), key=lambda x: GPU_MEM - mem_used[x])
            else:
                # Prefer GPUs with lower current KVPR
                scores = []
                for g in feasible_gpus:
                    free = GPU_MEM - mem_used[g]
                    kvpr = load_used[g] / free if free > 0 else float('inf')
                    scores.append(1.0 / (kvpr + 1e-9))
                total = sum(scores)
                if total > 0:
                    probs = [s/total for s in scores]
                    g = random.choices(feasible_gpus, weights=probs)[0]
                else:
                    g = random.choice(feasible_gpus)
            
            placement[g].append(m_obj)
            mem_used[g] += size
            load_used[g] += load
        
        # Helper to compute KVPRs
        def compute_kvprs(mem, load):
            kvprs = []
            for g in range(gpu_num):
                free = GPU_MEM - mem[g]
                if free > 0:
                    kvprs.append(load[g] / free)
                else:
                    kvprs.append(float('inf'))
            return kvprs
        
        current_kvprs = compute_kvprs(mem_used, load_used)
        current_max = max(current_kvprs)
        
        best_local_placement = {g: list(placement[g]) for g in range(gpu_num)}
        best_local_mem = list(mem_used)
        best_local_load = list(load_used)
        best_local_max = current_max
        
        # Simulated annealing
        T = 2.0
        cooling = 0.997
        for step in range(4000):
            if T < 1e-8:
                break
            
            # Find GPU with highest KVPR
            max_gpu = max(range(gpu_num), key=lambda g: current_kvprs[g])
            if not placement[max_gpu]:
                T *= cooling
                continue
            
            # Try to move a model from max_gpu
            idx = random.randrange(len(placement[max_gpu]))
            m_obj = placement[max_gpu][idx]
            m_info = next(x for x in model_data if x[0] == m_obj)
            size, load = m_info[1], m_info[2]
            
            # Find feasible target GPUs
            feasible_targets = [g for g in range(gpu_num) 
                              if g != max_gpu and mem_used[g] + size <= GPU_MEM]
            
            if feasible_targets:
                # Evaluate best target
                best_target = -1
                best_new_max = float('inf')
                
                for target_gpu in feasible_targets:
                    # Calculate new KVPRs
                    new_mem_max = mem_used[max_gpu] - size
                    new_load_max = load_used[max_gpu] - load
                    new_kvpr_max = new_load_max / (GPU_MEM - new_mem_max) if GPU_MEM - new_mem_max > 0 else float('inf')
                    
                    new_mem_target = mem_used[target_gpu] + size
                    new_load_target = load_used[target_gpu] + load
                    new_kvpr_target = new_load_target / (GPU_MEM - new_mem_target) if GPU_MEM - new_mem_target > 0 else float('inf')
                    
                    # Compute new maximum
                    temp_kvprs = list(current_kvprs)
                    temp_kvprs[max_gpu] = new_kvpr_max
                    temp_kvprs[target_gpu] = new_kvpr_target
                    new_max = max(temp_kvprs)
                    
                    if new_max < best_new_max:
                        best_new_max = new_max
                        best_target = target_gpu
                
                if best_target != -1:
                    delta = best_new_max - current_max
                    accept = delta < 0 or random.random() < math.exp(-delta / T)
                    
                    if accept:
                        # Perform the move
                        placement[max_gpu].pop(idx)
                        placement[best_target].append(m_obj)
                        
                        mem_used[max_gpu] -= size
                        load_used[max_gpu] -= load
                        mem_used[best_target] += size
                        load_used[best_target] += load
                        
                        current_kvprs[max_gpu] = (load_used[max_gpu] / 
                                                 (GPU_MEM - mem_used[max_gpu]) if 
                                                 GPU_MEM - mem_used[max_gpu] > 0 else float('inf'))
                        current_kvprs[best_target] = (load_used[best_target] / 
                                                     (GPU_MEM - mem_used[best_target]) if 
                                                     GPU_MEM - mem_used[best_target] > 0 else float('inf'))
                        current_max = best_new_max
                        
                        if current_max < best_local_max:
                            best_local_max = current_max
                            best_local_placement = {g: list(placement[g]) for g in range(gpu_num)}
                            best_local_mem = list(mem_used)
                            best_local_load = list(load_used)
            
            # Occasionally try swaps
            if random.random() < 0.3 and len(models) > 1:
                g1, g2 = random.sample(range(gpu_num), 2)
                if placement[g1] and placement[g2]:
                    idx1 = random.randrange(len(placement[g1]))
                    idx2 = random.randrange(len(placement[g2]))
                    m1 = placement[g1][idx1]
                    m2 = placement[g2][idx2]
                    
                    info1 = next(x for x in model_data if x[0] == m1)
                    info2 = next(x for x in model_data if x[0] == m2)
                    s1, l1 = info1[1], info1[2]
                    s2, l2 = info2[1], info2[2]
                    
                    if (mem_used[g1] - s1 + s2 <= GPU_MEM and 
                        mem_used[g2] - s2 + s1 <= GPU_MEM):
                        
                        new_mem1 = mem_used[g1] - s1 + s2
                        new_mem2 = mem_used[g2] - s2 + s1
                        new_load1 = load_used[g1] - l1 + l2
                        new_load2 = load_used[g2] - l2 + l1
                        
                        new_kvpr1 = new_load1 / (GPU_MEM - new_mem1) if GPU_MEM - new_mem1 > 0 else float('inf')
                        new_kvpr2 = new_load2 / (GPU_MEM - new_mem2) if GPU_MEM - new_mem2 > 0 else float('inf')
                        
                        temp_kvprs = list(current_kvprs)
                        temp_kvprs[g1] = new_kvpr1
                        temp_kvprs[g2] = new_kvpr2
                        new_max = max(temp_kvprs)
                        
                        delta = new_max - current_max
                        accept = delta < 0 or random.random() < math.exp(-delta / T)
                        
                        if accept:
                            placement[g1][idx1], placement[g2][idx2] = m2, m1
                            mem_used[g1], mem_used[g2] = new_mem1, new_mem2
                            load_used[g1], load_used[g2] = new_load1, new_load2
                            current_kvprs[g1], current_kvprs[g2] = new_kvpr1, new_kvpr2
                            current_max = new_max
                            
                            if current_max < best_local_max:
                                best_local_max = current_max
                                best_local_placement = {g: list(placement[g]) for g in range(gpu_num)}
                                best_local_mem = list(mem_used)
                                best_local_load = list(load_used)
            
            T *= cooling
        
        # Update global best
        if best_local_max < best_max_kvpr:
            best_max_kvpr = best_local_max
            best_placement = best_local_placement
    
    # Final fallback if needed
    if best_placement is None:
        best_placement = {i: [] for i in range(gpu_num)}
        mem = [0] * gpu_num
        for m_obj, size, _, _ in model_data:
            g = min(range(gpu_num), key=lambda x: mem[x])
            best_placement[g].append(m_obj)
            mem[g] += size
    
    return best_placement

import random
import math
import heapq
from collections import defaultdict

class Model:
    def __init__(self, model_id, model_size, req_rate, slo):
        self.model_id = model_id
        self.model_size = model_size
        self.req_rate = req_rate
        self.slo = slo

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"Model(id={self.model_id}, size={self.model_size}, rate={self.req_rate}, slo={self.slo})"

def compute_model_placement(gpu_num, models):
    MEM_LIMIT = 80

    # Precompute model characteristics and create unique identifiers
    model_data = []
    for i, m in enumerate(models):
        # Ensure a unique identifier for each model, if not already present
        if not hasattr(m, 'model_id'):
            m.model_id = i  # Assign an index as ID if no ID exists

        load = m.req_rate / m.slo
        density = load / m.model_size if m.model_size > 0 else float('inf')
        model_data.append({
            'model_id': m.model_id,
            'model_obj': m,
            'size': m.model_size,
            'load': load,
            'density': density
        })

    # Sort by density (high to low) - place demanding models first
    model_data.sort(key=lambda x: x['density'], reverse=True)

    best_placement = None
    best_max_kvpr = float('inf')

    # Multiple restarts with different random seeds
    num_restarts = 50  # Increased restarts for better exploration

    for restart in range(num_restarts):
        random.seed(restart * 100 + len(models))

        # Initialize GPUs
        placement = {i: [] for i in range(gpu_num)}
        gpu_mem_used = [0] * gpu_num
        gpu_load_used = [0.0] * gpu_num
        placed_model_ids = set()

        # Greedy initial placement with randomization
        for md in model_data:
            model_id = md['model_id']
            model_size = md['size']
            model_load = md['load']

            feasible_gpus = [g for g in range(gpu_num)
                           if gpu_mem_used[g] + model_size <= MEM_LIMIT]

            if not feasible_gpus:
                # Fallback: assign to GPU with most free space if it can fit
                # This scenario should ideally not happen if models are sorted by size and there's enough total capacity
                # but added as a safeguard.
                free_space = [(MEM_LIMIT - gpu_mem_used[g], g) for g in range(gpu_num)]
                free_space.sort(reverse=True)
                
                if free_space[0][0] >= model_size:
                    best_gpu = free_space[0][1]
                else:
                    # This model cannot be placed, which indicates an issue with the problem constraints or approach
                    # For this problem, we assume all models can be placed.
                    continue # Skip this model if no space at all
            else:
                # Calculate current KVPR for feasible GPUs
                current_gpu_kvprs = []
                for g in feasible_gpus:
                    remaining_mem = MEM_LIMIT - gpu_mem_used[g]
                    if remaining_mem > 0:
                        kvpr = gpu_load_used[g] / remaining_mem
                    else:
                        kvpr = float('inf') # Should not happen if mem_used < MEM_LIMIT
                    current_gpu_kvprs.append((kvpr, g))

                # Use a weighted random choice based on inverse KVPR (lower KVPR is better)
                # We want to choose a GPU that currently has a low KVPR among feasible options.
                # For selection, we can use a probabilistic approach.
                # Consider the inverse of KVPR (or a transformation) as a "goodness" score.
                # A simple approach is to make probabilities inversely proportional to KVPR.
                
                # Ensure no infinite KVPRs in the list for probability calculation
                valid_kvprs_for_prob = [(k, g) for k, g in current_gpu_kvprs if k != float('inf')]

                if not valid_kvprs_for_prob:
                    # If all feasible GPUs have infinite KVPR (e.g., 0 free memory), pick randomly
                    best_gpu = random.choice(feasible_gpus)
                else:
                    # Calculate weights based on inverse of KVPR (adding a small epsilon to avoid division by zero)
                    weights = [1.0 / (kvpr + 1e-9) for kvpr, g in valid_kvprs_for_prob]
                    total_weight = sum(weights)
                    
                    if total_weight > 0:
                        probs = [w / total_weight for w in weights]
                        chosen_index = random.choices(range(len(valid_kvprs_for_prob)), weights=probs, k=1)[0]
                        best_gpu = valid_kvprs_for_prob[chosen_index][1]
                    else:
                        # Fallback if weights sum to zero (highly unlikely with epsilon)
                        best_gpu = random.choice(feasible_gpus)
            
            # Assign model to the chosen GPU
            placement[best_gpu].append(md['model_obj'])
            gpu_mem_used[best_gpu] += model_size
            gpu_load_used[best_gpu] += model_load
            placed_model_ids.add(model_id)
        
        # Local search with multiple improvement strategies
        improved = True
        iterations = 0
        max_iterations = 150 # Increased iterations for local search

        while improved and iterations < max_iterations:
            improved = False
            iterations += 1
            
            # Calculate current KVPRs for all GPUs
            current_kvprs = []
            for g in range(gpu_num):
                remaining_mem = MEM_LIMIT - gpu_mem_used[g]
                if remaining_mem > 0:
                    current_kvprs.append(gpu_load_used[g] / remaining_mem)
                else:
                    current_kvprs.append(float('inf'))
            
            current_max_kvpr = max(current_kvprs)
            
            # Find the GPU with the maximum KVPR
            max_gpu_indices = [i for i, kvpr in enumerate(current_kvprs) if kvpr == current_max_kvpr]
            max_gpu = random.choice(max_gpu_indices) # Pick one randomly if multiple

            # Strategy 1: Move models from max GPU to others
            if placement[max_gpu]:
                # Sort models on max GPU by load/size ratio (descending) - try moving least "efficient" first
                models_on_max_data = []
                for m_obj in placement[max_gpu]:
                    for md_iter in model_data:
                        if md_iter['model_id'] == m_obj.model_id:
                            models_on_max_data.append(md_iter)
                            break
                
                models_on_max_data.sort(key=lambda x: x['load'] / x['size'] if x['size'] > 0 else float('inf'), reverse=True)
                
                for md_to_move in models_on_max_data:
                    model_id_to_move = md_to_move['model_id']
                    size_to_move = md_to_move['size']
                    load_to_move = md_to_move['load']

                    # Try moving to each other GPU
                    for target_gpu in range(gpu_num):
                        if target_gpu == max_gpu:
                            continue
                        
                        # Check if move is feasible
                        if gpu_mem_used[target_gpu] + size_to_move <= MEM_LIMIT:
                            # Calculate new KVPRs if move is made
                            new_mem_max = gpu_mem_used[max_gpu] - size_to_move
                            new_load_max = gpu_load_used[max_gpu] - load_to_move
                            new_mem_target = gpu_mem_used[target_gpu] + size_to_move
                            new_load_target = gpu_load_used[target_gpu] + load_to_move
                            
                            # Avoid division by zero or invalid memory states
                            if MEM_LIMIT - new_mem_max <= 0 or MEM_LIMIT - new_mem_target <= 0:
                                continue
                            
                            new_kvpr_max = new_load_max / (MEM_LIMIT - new_mem_max)
                            new_kvpr_target = new_load_target / (MEM_LIMIT - new_mem_target)
                            
                            # Calculate new maximum KVPR across all GPUs
                            temp_kvprs_after_move = list(current_kvprs) # Copy current KVPRs
                            temp_kvprs_after_move[max_gpu] = new_kvpr_max
                            temp_kvprs_after_move[target_gpu] = new_kvpr_target
                            new_max_kvpr_overall = max(temp_kvprs_after_move)
                            
                            # If this move reduces the overall maximum KVPR, perform the move
                            if new_max_kvpr_overall < current_max_kvpr - 1e-9: # Use tolerance for float comparison
                                # Execute the move
                                placement[max_gpu].remove(md_to_move['model_obj'])
                                placement[target_gpu].append(md_to_move['model_obj'])
                                
                                gpu_mem_used[max_gpu] = new_mem_max
                                gpu_load_used[max_gpu] = new_load_max
                                gpu_mem_used[target_gpu] = new_mem_target
                                gpu_load_used[target_gpu] = new_load_target
                                
                                improved = True
                                break # Move made, restart local search from this new state
                    
                    if improved:
                        break # Break from iterating through models on max_gpu
            
            # Strategy 2: Pairwise swaps if no improvement from moves
            if not improved:
                best_swap = None
                best_improvement_in_swap = 0 # Track improvement from a swap

                # Try all pairs of GPUs
                for g1 in range(gpu_num):
                    for g2 in range(g1 + 1, gpu_num):
                        if not placement[g1] or not placement[g2]:
                            continue
                        
                        # Try swapping models between g1 and g2
                        for m1_obj in placement[g1]:
                            for m2_obj in placement[g2]:
                                # Find model data for m1 and m2
                                md1 = next((md for md in model_data if md['model_id'] == m1_obj.model_id), None)
                                md2 = next((md for md in model_data if md['model_id'] == m2_obj.model_id), None)
                                
                                if not md1 or not md2: # Should not happen if model_data is comprehensive
                                    continue
                                
                                # Check feasibility after swap
                                new_mem_g1 = gpu_mem_used[g1] - md1['size'] + md2['size']
                                new_mem_g2 = gpu_mem_used[g2] - md2['size'] + md1['size']
                                
                                if new_mem_g1 > MEM_LIMIT or new_mem_g2 > MEM_LIMIT:
                                    continue
                                
                                # Calculate new loads
                                new_load_g1 = gpu_load_used[g1] - md1['load'] + md2['load']
                                new_load_g2 = gpu_load_used[g2] - md2['load'] + md1['load']
                                
                                # Calculate new KVPRs for g1 and g2
                                new_kvpr_g1 = new_load_g1 / (MEM_LIMIT - new_mem_g1) if MEM_LIMIT - new_mem_g1 > 0 else float('inf')
                                new_kvpr_g2 = new_load_g2 / (MEM_LIMIT - new_mem_g2) if MEM_LIMIT - new_mem_g2 > 0 else float('inf')

                                # Calculate new maximum KVPR across all GPUs if swap occurs
                                temp_kvprs_after_swap = list(current_kvprs)
                                temp_kvprs_after_swap[g1] = new_kvpr_g1
                                temp_kvprs_after_swap[g2] = new_kvpr_g2
                                new_max_kvpr_overall_after_swap = max(temp_kvprs_after_swap)
                                
                                # If this swap reduces the overall maximum KVPR
                                if new_max_kvpr_overall_after_swap < current_max_kvpr - 1e-9:
                                    improvement_from_swap = current_max_kvpr - new_max_kvpr_overall_after_swap
                                    if improvement_from_swap > best_improvement_in_swap:
                                        best_improvement_in_swap = improvement_from_swap
                                        best_swap = (g1, m1_obj, g2, m2_obj, md1, md2)
                
                # Execute best swap if found and it offers improvement
                if best_swap and best_improvement_in_swap > 1e-9:
                    g1, m1_obj, g2, m2_obj, md1, md2 = best_swap
                    
                    # Perform the swap
                    placement[g1].remove(m1_obj)
                    placement[g2].remove(m2_obj)
                    placement[g1].append(m2_obj)
                    placement[g2].append(m1_obj)
                    
                    # Update memory and load used for the GPUs
                    gpu_mem_used[g1] = gpu_mem_used[g1] - md1['size'] + md2['size']
                    gpu_load_used[g1] = gpu_load_used[g1] - md1['load'] + md2['load']
                    gpu_mem_used[g2] = gpu_mem_used[g2] - md2['size'] + md1['size']
                    gpu_load_used[g2] = gpu_load_used[g2] - md2['load'] + md1['load']
                    
                    improved = True # Mark that an improvement was made
        
        # Calculate final KVPR for this restart and update best solution if better
        final_kvprs = []
        for g in range(gpu_num):
            remaining_mem = MEM_LIMIT - gpu_mem_used[g]
            if remaining_mem > 0:
                final_kvprs.append(gpu_load_used[g] / remaining_mem)
            else:
                final_kvprs.append(float('inf'))
        
        final_max_kvpr = max(final_kvprs)
        
        if final_max_kvpr < best_max_kvpr - 1e-8:
            best_max_kvpr = final_max_kvpr
            # Deep copy the placement to store the best configuration
            best_placement = {g: list(placement[g]) for g in range(gpu_num)}
            
    # Ensure all models are placed in the best_placement, if not, fall back to a simpler greedy
    if best_placement:
        all_placed_ids = set()
        for gpu_id, model_list in best_placement.items():
            for m_obj in model_list:
                all_placed_ids.add(m_obj.model_id)
        
        if len(all_placed_ids) != len(models):
            # Fallback if some models are missing in the best_placement
            best_placement = None

    if best_placement is None:
        # Fallback greedy solution if no good solution found or all models not placed
        placement = {i: [] for i in range(gpu_num)}
        gpu_mem_used = [0] * gpu_num
        
        # Sort models by size (descending) for simpler greedy placement
        sorted_models_for_fallback = sorted(model_data, key=lambda x: x['size'], reverse=True)

        for md in sorted_models_for_fallback:
            model_id = md['model_id']
            model_size = md['size']
            
            # Find GPU with most free space that can accommodate the model
            best_fit_gpu = -1
            max_free_space = -1

            for g in range(gpu_num):
                if gpu_mem_used[g] + model_size <= MEM_LIMIT:
                    current_free_space = MEM_LIMIT - (gpu_mem_used[g] + model_size)
                    if current_free_space > max_free_space:
                        max_free_space = current_free_space
                        best_fit_gpu = g
            
            if best_fit_gpu != -1: # If a suitable GPU was found
                placement[best_fit_gpu].append(md['model_obj'])
                gpu_mem_used[best_fit_gpu] += model_size
            # If no GPU can fit, this model is unplaced. This implies a problem with input constraints.
            # For this problem, we assume all models can be placed.
    
        best_placement = placement

    # Final check to ensure all models are assigned and memory limits are not exceeded
    final_assigned_model_ids = set()
    for gpu_id in best_placement:
        current_mem = 0
        for model_obj in best_placement[gpu_id]:
            final_assigned_model_ids.add(model_obj.model_id)
            current_mem += model_obj.model_size
        if current_mem > MEM_LIMIT:
            # This should not happen if logic is correct, but as a safeguard
            raise ValueError(f"Memory limit exceeded on GPU {gpu_id} in final placement.")
    
    if len(final_assigned_model_ids) != len(models):
        raise ValueError("Not all models were assigned in the final placement.")

    return best_placement

import random
import math
import copy

def compute_model_placement(gpu_num, models):
    GPU_MEMORY_LIMIT = 80
    
    # Create wrapper with ID and precomputed values
    class ModelWrapper:
        __slots__ = ('id', 'model_size', 'req_rate', 'slo', 'load')
        def __init__(self, idx, model):
            self.id = idx
            self.model_size = model.model_size
            self.req_rate = model.req_rate
            self.slo = model.slo
            self.load = model.req_rate / model.slo

    # Create GPU state class
    class GPUState:
        __slots__ = ('id', 'model_ids', 'mem_used', 'total_load')
        def __init__(self, gpu_id):
            self.id = gpu_id
            self.model_ids = []
            self.mem_used = 0
            self.total_load = 0.0
        
        def kvpr(self):
            remaining = GPU_MEMORY_LIMIT - self.mem_used
            if remaining <= 1e-9:
                return float('inf')
            return self.total_load / remaining
        
        def can_add(self, model):
            return self.mem_used + model.model_size <= GPU_MEMORY_LIMIT
        
        def add_model(self, model):
            self.model_ids.append(model.id)
            self.mem_used += model.model_size
            self.total_load += model.load
        
        def remove_model(self, model):
            self.model_ids.remove(model.id)
            self.mem_used -= model.model_size
            self.total_load -= model.load

    # Initialize data structures
    model_wrappers = [ModelWrapper(i, m) for i, m in enumerate(models)]
    model_dict = {m.id: m for m in model_wrappers}
    
    if not model_wrappers:
        return {i: [] for i in range(gpu_num)}
    
    best_assignment = None
    best_score = float('inf')
    
    # Multiple restarts with different strategies
    for restart in range(30):
        gpus = [GPUState(i) for i in range(gpu_num)]
        assignment = {i: [] for i in range(gpu_num)}
        
        # Different ordering strategies
        if restart % 3 == 0:
            # Strategy 1: Sort by load per memory unit (most "intensive" first)
            sorted_models = sorted(model_wrappers, 
                                  key=lambda m: m.load / (m.model_size + 1e-9), 
                                  reverse=True)
        elif restart % 3 == 1:
            # Strategy 2: Sort by model size (largest first)
            sorted_models = sorted(model_wrappers, 
                                  key=lambda m: m.model_size, 
                                  reverse=True)
        else:
            # Strategy 3: Random shuffle
            sorted_models = list(model_wrappers)
            random.shuffle(sorted_models)
        
        # Greedy placement with lookahead
        for model in sorted_models:
            best_gpu = None
            best_increase = float('inf')
            current_max = max(g.kvpr() for g in gpus)
            
            for gpu in gpus:
                if gpu.can_add(model):
                    # Calculate new KVPR for this GPU
                    new_mem = gpu.mem_used + model.model_size
                    new_load = gpu.total_load + model.load
                    new_kvpr = new_load / (GPU_MEMORY_LIMIT - new_mem) if new_mem < GPU_MEMORY_LIMIT else float('inf')
                    
                    # Calculate new maximum KVPR
                    old_kvpr = gpu.kvpr()
                    new_max = current_max
                    if new_kvpr > old_kvpr:
                        if new_kvpr > current_max:
                            new_max = new_kvpr
                    else:
                        if old_kvpr >= current_max - 1e-12:  # This GPU had maximum
                            # Recalculate maximum without this GPU
                            temp_max = 0
                            for g in gpus:
                                if g.id != gpu.id:
                                    temp_max = max(temp_max, g.kvpr())
                            new_max = max(temp_max, new_kvpr)
                    
                    if new_max < best_increase:
                        best_increase = new_max
                        best_gpu = gpu
            
            # If no GPU can accommodate, find one with most free memory
            if best_gpu is None:
                best_gpu = max(gpus, key=lambda g: GPU_MEMORY_LIMIT - g.mem_used)
            
            # Place the model
            best_gpu.add_model(model)
            assignment[best_gpu.id].append(model.id)
        
        # Verify all models placed
        placed_count = sum(len(ids) for ids in assignment.values())
        if placed_count != len(model_wrappers):
            continue
        
        # Local search optimization
        improvement = True
        iteration = 0
        while improvement and iteration < 100:
            improvement = False
            iteration += 1
            
            # Find GPU with maximum KVPR
            kvpr_values = [g.kvpr() for g in gpus]
            max_kvpr_val = max(kvpr_values)
            max_gpu_idx = kvpr_values.index(max_kvpr_val)
            max_gpu = gpus[max_gpu_idx]
            
            # Try moving models from max GPU to others
            for model_id in list(max_gpu.model_ids):
                model = model_dict[model_id]
                original_score = max_kvpr_val
                
                for target_gpu in gpus:
                    if target_gpu.id == max_gpu.id:
                        continue
                    
                    if target_gpu.can_add(model):
                        # Simulate move
                        max_gpu.remove_model(model)
                        target_gpu.add_model(model)
                        
                        new_max = max(g.kvpr() for g in gpus)
                        
                        if new_max < original_score - 1e-12:
                            # Commit move
                            assignment[max_gpu.id].remove(model_id)
                            assignment[target_gpu.id].append(model_id)
                            improvement = True
                            break
                        else:
                            # Revert
                            target_gpu.remove_model(model)
                            max_gpu.add_model(model)
                
                if improvement:
                    break
            
            # Try swaps if no improvement from moves
            if not improvement and len(max_gpu.model_ids) > 0:
                for model_a_id in list(max_gpu.model_ids):
                    model_a = model_dict[model_a_id]
                    
                    for target_gpu in gpus:
                        if target_gpu.id == max_gpu.id:
                            continue
                        
                        for model_b_id in list(target_gpu.model_ids):
                            model_b = model_dict[model_b_id]
                            
                            # Check if swap is memory feasible
